title: Ensure iptables are flushed with nftables

prose.en: Ensure iptables are flushed with nftables

description.en: nftables is a replacement for iptables, ip6tables, ebtables and arptables

rationale.en: It is possible to mix iptables and nftables. However, this increases complexity and also the chance to introduce errors. For simplicity flush out all iptables rules, and ensure it is not loaded

audit.en:
Run the following commands to flush iptables:  

For iptables:  

For ip6tables:

```
# ip6tables -F
```

```
# iptables -F
```

remediation.en:
Run the following commands to flush iptables:  

For iptables:  

For ip6tables:

```
# ip6tables -F
```

```
# iptables -F
```
